episodes.title: Undercover Cop Working Inside Satanic Cults - Agent Scott Payne Tells All
episodes.description: Anything Goes with James English Ep 535 Undercover Cop Working Inside Satanic Cults - Agent Scott Payne Tells All For over 25 years, Scott Payne worked undercover in the FBI, infiltrating some of the world’s most secretive and dangerous satanic cults. In this episode, Scott reveals what it was really like living a double life—earning the trust of cult members, witnessing disturbing rituals firsthand, and risking everything to bring down organisations operating in the shadows. From psychological manipulation to the constant threat of being exposed, Scott shares the reality of undercover work and the mental toll it takes. This is a rare, firsthand account of the hidden world most people never see. 🎙️ Topics covered: * Undercover FBI operations inside satanic cults * How agents gain trust and avoid being exposed * The dangers of infiltrating secret organisations * Real stories from 25 years in the field * The psychological impact of undercover work This is one of the most intense and revealing undercover stories you’ll ever hear. #FBI #youtube #Viral #Cults #jamesenglish #horror You can contact James on his social media platforms. ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ http://instagram.com/jamesenglish2https://x.com/jamesenglish0 https://www.facebook.com/share/1GHEKrNZV1/?mibextid=wwXIfr https://www.tiktok.com/@jamesenglishpodcast?_t=ZN-8z0ZI6MBb9C&_r=1 https://open.spotify.com/show/4PIErllOO06wFHyX4LkGLH?si=c36a8b3f513d4316 https://itunes.apple.com

episodes.title: My Mother, the Satanic Killer - Cult Leader's Daughter, Kelly Higgins Speaks Out
episodes.description: Born into a Satanic Killing cult of secrecy, control, and fear, the daughter of Bernadette McNeilly breaks her silence for the very first time. Raised inside what she describes as a satanic cult, she recounts a childhood shaped by manipulation, ritualistic belief systems, and extreme violence. At the centre of it all was her mother, Bernadette McNeilly, and a close-knit group whose actions led to the brutal killing of an innocent 16-year-old.In this gripping episode, she speaks openly about the crimes, the psychological conditioning, and the lifelong impact of growing up surrounded by death and devotion to darkness. This is not just a story about murder, it’s about survival, truth, and the courage it takes to confront a past many would rather keep buried. Listener discretion is advised. You can contact James on his social media platforms. ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ http://instagram.com/jamesenglish2https://x.com/jamesenglish0 https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61577060205838 https://www.tiktok.com/@jamesenglishpodcast?_t=ZN-8z0ZI6MBb9C&_r=1 https://open.spotify.com/show/4PIErllOO06wFHyX4LkGLH?si=c36a8b3f513d4316 https://itunes.apple.com
